pr.title: [Non-record] 1-Stage Byte-level H-Net at 17.5M: Dynamic Chunking Learns Whitespace-aligned (Word-like) Boundaries (39x-91x fewer params than H-Net paper)

output.summary: 1-stage H-Net on raw bytes learns whitespace-aligned dynamic chunks via routing, contrasted with subword behavior in matched DDP ablations.
techniques: dynamic chunking router recovers byte-level word boundaries
matched byte vs subword ablations expose chunk regularity metrics
